query: SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(TABLE_NAME ORDER BY TABLE_NAME SEPARATOR '\n') as all_tables FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE();
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user KBF53B6TGXz9Z1D.root --database SQ6yxhwuwXauyoM9DVdVk2 --execute SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(TABLE_NAME ORDER BY TABLE_NAME SEPARATOR '\n') as all_tables FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE();
